title: Dysoxylum hasseltii
intro: Dysoxylum hasseltii, also known as the Java bean tree or Javanese bean tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, exhibiting potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Dysoxylum hasseltii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used to make tinctures and other extract-based preparations.
taxonomy: Dysoxylum hasseltii is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae. This classification places it within the order Sapindales, which includes other plants such as soapberry and lychee trees. The genus Dysoxylum is native to various parts of Asia, including Southeast Asia and the Indian subcontinent. Dysoxylum hasseltii is also known to be a part of the subfamily Melioideae. It is commonly found in tropical forests, often growing near rivers or streams.
uses: Dysoxylum hasseltii is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine. It is used to treat various ailments including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and bark contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for infections and inflammatory conditions. In traditional medicine, it is also used to treat diarrhea and other gastrointestinal issues. Further research is needed to confirm the effectiveness of Dysoxylum hasseltii for medicinal purposes.
benefits: Dysoxylum hasseltii, also known as the Assam white cedar, is a plant with potential health benefits. Its extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. These properties may contribute to the plant's ability to protect against infections and reduce inflammation in the body.
